claimText: PSL-affiliated guidance states that generative AI tools cannot be considered co-authors of scientific work, and users retain full responsibility for AI-generated content, codes, images, and texts.

citation.citationTitle: Utiliser l'intelligence artificielle dans sa recherche : des recommandations pour le respect de l'intégrité scientifique
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
